sensitivity: Breast: 0.97 [0.96, 0.99]; Thyroid (TI-RADS biopsy recommendation): 0.644 [0.545, 0.744]; Thyroid (TI-RADS follow-up): 0.879 [0.812, 0.946]
specificity: Breast: 0.61 [0.57, 0.66]; Thyroid (TI-RADS biopsy recommendation): 0.612 [0.566, 0.658]; Thyroid (TI-RADS follow-up): 0.495 [0.446, 0.544]
intended_use: Koios DS is an artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML)-based computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) software device intended for use as an adjunct to diagnostic ultrasound examinations of lesions
intended_use_full: Koios DS is an artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML)-based computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) software device intended for use as an adjunct to diagnostic ultrasound examinations of lesions or nodules suspicious for breast or thyroid cancer.
target_condition: Breast lesions and thyroid nodules suspicious for cancer
ground_truth: Breast: pathology or 1-year follow-up for non-biopsied cases; Thyroid: histopathology and/or cyto-pathology and/or surgical excision
other_metrics: Breast: Positive Predictive Value (PPV), Negative Predictive Value (NPV), Positive Likelihood Ratio (PLR), Negative Likelihood Ratio (NLR) tested but specific values not reported. Positive Likelihood Ratio and Negative Likelihood Ratio characterized. Clinical study demonstrated AUC improvement of 0.083 [0.066, 0.099] for thyroid overall and 0.074 [0.051, 0.098] for US-based readers on US cases.
